item.title: My CV
item.description: A list of projects I participated during my profecctional career.

item.title: Projects
item.description: Taxi voice order Implemented from scratch to high-CCU production and became a maintainer of a backend microservice. The service enables taxi passengers order a taxi via giving commands as an answer to voice guidance.

item.title: Welcome to Ivan Kopylov
item.description: Hey, I am Ivan. This is my personal page where I post different things related to my area of interest. Here is my CV.
